Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to transform into event log suitable for process mining

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Provide table with columns Case ID Activity Timestamp maybe other attributes like Application Document

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Need to infer cases logical units of work editing a specific document handling an email reviewing PDF updating budget

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we can define cases Case 1 Document1 docx editing writing intro details save later reference insertion So events from 090000 focus Document1 typing save later switch back at 090600 typing save close So case ID maybe C1

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Email reply about Annual Meeting Events switch to Chrome email open email scroll click reply typing send So case ID C2

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Review Report Draft pdf Events switch to Acrobat scroll highlight So case ID C3

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 4 Budget 2024 xlsx update Events focus Excel typing save So case ID C4

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 5 Quarterly Report docx executive summary Events focus typing save close So case ID C5

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Potential also include initial focus on Quarterly Report at 085950 but no activity until later Could be part of same case as C5

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus produce event log rows with Activity names standardized Edit Document Save Document Read Email Reply Email Send Email Review PDF Highlight Text Update Spreadsheet Close Document

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each raw event we map to higher level activity FOCUS on a document Open Document TYPING in Word Edit Document SAVE Save Document SWITCH Switch Application CLICK open email Open Email SCROLL Read Email CLICK reply Reply Email TYPING in email Compose Reply CLICK send Send Email SCROLL in PDF Read PDF HIGHLIGHT Highlight Text TYPING in Excel Edit Spreadsheet SAVE in Excel Save Spreadsheet CLOSE Close Document

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now produce table with columns Case ID Activity Timestamp ISO Application Object document email pdf spreadsheet Use markdown table

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Will include initial focus on Quarterly Report at 085950 as part of C5
